item.title: AOC considering presidential run in 2028
item.description: United States Representative Democrat Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez is considering making a run for President in 2028 https://x.com/rawsalerts/status/1862527075103723641
item.dc:creator: puzzledeagle

item.title: Fetish Friday - Back once again with the *unhinged* behaviour
item.description:
Dating a goth girl comes with expectations and responsibilities you better to be prepared for
But I like both, because they're both a type of caring way to show affection
That's a whole different level of religious persecution
See, throw Riker in the mix and Quark would have had poor Rom in the Holosuites with a mop and bucket 24/7
Not sure if in that situation it's better to be pissed off or pissed on
A bop it with a surprise ending, with the best prizes to be won
Call that meat Strongbow
Honestly given Kira and Jadzia's behaviour, Riker appearing on DS9 would have derailed the entire show
There's a rule: if you make a joke about a fetish 3 times, that's your fetish. I don't make the rules, I just enforce (and encourage) them
I know she wasn't lesbian, but she definitely made a few lesbians in her time. I wonder if I'm my mirror universe counterpart? My sex toy collection says "Don't even kid yourself slut"
Not me calling the manager over to have an in depth and awkward conversation about the Hentai I've seen in my time that led to this point
That, dipping my fingers into candle wax... These were all indicators
My dumb ass thinking I'd get a spanking instead of a lecture...
We all are, and I'm not ashamed to admit it
Yeeeaaah... I do that. They're too pure and soft and innocent to see me sin
Is there a better and more delicious combination? Scientists say "Yes, what's wrong with you?"
I kept seeing people doing this with the Scrub Daddy but Mommy's deserve meme too Well, you made it through yet another one of these. Congratulations, like me, you probably need therapy, but I'm not here to shame anyone. Unless that's your kink, in which case you should be very ashamed you dirty little slut Until next Friday, same Bat time, same Bat channel
It honestly really is. Life sometimes gets a little more rough than I'm used to and doesn't listen to my safe word
That's two...
This is bad advice. Always take your pet and try dollars on to make sure they fit. This is sound advice for both your fur babies and puppy/cat boys/girls
"Prove it" is the more fun and dangerous answer
I've seen enough Hentai to know where I'd like this to go
With thanksgiving over, apart from the turkey, who else was stuffed? With food, you perverts
One of life's greatest pleasures is being able to have a couple of cupcakes. Well actually it's art and music and food, but they can be used to reach the goal of being allowed her cupcakes
"My will is strong" and other lies I've told myself moments before ending up in a situation involving a safe word
Sorry Daddy, I've been a naughty girl just hits different
Neurodivergant people here be like "Please be explicit in explaining you are flirting with me specifically for the sake of flirting" because it's me, I'm neurodivergant people
If you've seen Eurotrip you know of worse safe words
I'm not actually a fan of pickles, but I have seen some people turn into sluts for pickles
And yet no source was provided
This is how my horny dumb ass ends up in the ER
I'd grill your cheese
I'll finish it for you, I want Mommy fl-.....
Once again, I'd grill your ceese
At this point, some of mine really are...
Honestly it's just rude
I'd be scared and willing to see the heavy BDSM version she has at home
Italian Doms and Dommes have just been offended
Just... Mmmmmmgfhff
This joke writes itself, I don't even need to try
Riker does live up to that reputation though. He'd impregnate a replicator if he could
Time is irrelevant answer the question!
To limit one's pleasure is to limit yourself. And life is all about pushing your limkts
*a new fantasy has been unlocked*
It's the song of our people
Yeah, say hi, you know who you are
Yeah, we all saw that and immediately thought of the same website
I have only eaten one of these. Just don't ask me what a date tastes like, I'd hate to have to lie to you...
It's Friday, and you know what that means. It's time to turn your phones away slightly in public, save and send these to your crushes, or just generally ask: Miss Meanie Pie, what is wrong with you? And to answer that question: thanks for asking. So once again it's time for me to dump the most inappropriate and wildest memes I can find and hope any AI that reads through these becomes as corrupt as the people viewing them. I'm currently binging Star Trek Voyager while doing this so I decided to include a few Star Trek memes in with the rest, because honestly, and all the nerds will tell you, Star Trek has more than a few horny moments *cough* Riker *cough* So before we begin, I've had a few people ask me: "Miss Meanie Pie, I hate your posts, go away" to which the only answer i can five is "Thanks, it's always nice to meet a fan" So now that the FAQ is out the way, here we go
Everyone loves a pancake that jiggles
item.dc:creator: MissMeaniePie

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends. i hope you had a frank and productive holiday
that's adorable
they always ask you to do that
mamma mia
wait what
happy thanksgiving friends
never fails
why is this so true
there's pictures of horses and milk so you know it's legit
mmm hmm
i.. don't know
i hope it's not licorice
cool thanks
shimp time
time for another eye washing
finally
dang
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Smol dump of legally stolen memes and things
item.description:
Be honest.
.
Would do.
.
The ancient battle persists.
.
I may be a bit manic.
It often loses.
.
.
When it's the end of the year and everything is a blur.
.
.
Mood.
.
Times are tough this holiday.
.
Like really tired.
.
1, 2 my traumas not meant for you
.
House Gecko Tax.

item.dc:creator: zanarchy805

item.title: Making the most of the only guitar I have left.
item.description: This is a one string kids learning guitar I found for 2 bucks at a local thrift store. I have had a few guitars over the years but never had time to learn to play them, so this one I am just toying with. What you hear me playing in this video is just a song I came up with. Honestly like the sound of it and I could probably make it better if I tried. Oh and the plunking sound in the back ground is my degus. They are chewing the bars of their cage to make music too lol. The guitar is called a Tinkertar if anyone wants to order one for their kid. They have a bunch of different shapes and types.
item.dc:creator: drousnavat

item.title: Non-venomous and by far one of the most commonly sighted snakes on the Sunshine Coast, the coastal carpet python is often found in homes and gardens.

item.title: My first cake day dump. Have some memes that have made me laugh, and a few that have made my SO moister than an oyster.
item.description:
Dinner time!
Glorious purpose!
Camera off and mute?
Meat popsicle.
Just hope it doesn't actually smell like a taco
...
Sploosh!
Nah, just enjoy the ride.
Ruffles Sour cream and cheddar chips!
Especially an overpriced stadium drink
KO
Yes, ma'am!
For us it's Ruffles Sour cream and cheddar chips.
You're in the Good Place!
Is that why it's was once called 'boning'?
Yup
item.dc:creator: immortalheart

item.title: Looks like I just needed a good cry after all
item.description:
A rescuer goes to the home of the dog whose life he saved years ago and their bond couldn't be purer
A father's joy when his daughter feels the sensation of walking for the first time, in a machine he built
Care workers surprise this 94-years-old veteran with a pillow of his wife's face after seeing he slept next to her photograph
Fathers reaction to his daughter winning 4 awards in school
Girl who used to be paralyzed surprises her old nurse by walking
It’s a tradition in Brazil to give the first piece of cake to the person you love the most
She surprised her best friend, whom she hadn't seen for a while, by coming to her graduation because she moved to another city.
The boy with non verbal autism says 'I love you daddy' to his dad for the first time.
The moment when this little girl met her brother and sister, who had not been able to meet her siblings because she had been treated for cancer in the hospital
This father cycles 1,400 miles to hear his daughter's heartbeat on Father's Day
This father's reaction to his daughter becoming a nurse.
This sweet grandma couldn't get her neighbours on the phone so she walked over and left a message, inviting them over for Tacos, on their doorbell camera
When older brother realized that the kidney donor was his younger brother
item.dc:creator: LogicDude

item.title: Memes about me or stuff I identify with this week.
item.description:
I’ve got to put this on my Tinder profile
Anyone else know why Imgur is now auto randomizing the order of the pics?
Off I go. Wish me luck.
Don’t even get me started on my lower back and knees. Assholes, the lot of them.
item.dc:creator: Wheretheheckisjason

item.title: The shows were about the human experience struggling to figure out society given the socioeconomic conditions they were placed in. It would still work today if TV had people with courage.

item.title: "My friend and I are weird and send each other weird things" dump #126
item.description:
Back by unpopular demand: me!
Apparently it was my cake day the other day so this is also a belated cake day dump.
Kinda fitting, considering what concert my asshole is taking me to.
*cries in Sleep Token*
It's almost like they can't hear me!
Till then - stay spooky!
item.dc:creator: TheNephilim337
